info.title: Servo API
info.description:
Run, fine-tune, and deploy robotics foundation models from one API.

## Install
```bash
pip install servo
```

## First call
```python
import servo
from servo import templates

client = servo.Servo(base_url="https://api.servo.dev", api_key="YOUR_KEY")
emb = client.embodiments.register(templates.so101())
obs = templates.sample_observation(emb)

action = client.act(model="pi0.5", embodiment=emb.id, observation=obs)
print(action.actions[0])  # joint_position, decoded
```

Switching models is a one-line change — Servo applies each model's preprocessing,
normalization, and action decoding. Incompatible model/embodiment pairs fail closed
with `409 ActionSpaceIncompatible` rather than returning a wrong action.

Authenticate every request with `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

schema.title: Response Get Templates V1 Embodiments Templates Get
Response Fetch V1 Embodiments  Emb Id  Get
Response List Models V1 Models Get
Response Get Model V1 Models  Slug  Get
Response Compatibility V1 Models  Slug  Compatibility Get
Response Model License V1 Models  Slug  License Get
Response Create Grant V1 License Grants Post
Response Fetch V1 Datasets  Ds Id  Get
Response Finetune V1 Jobs Finetune Post
Response Eval  V1 Jobs Eval Post
Response Synthdata V1 Jobs Synthdata Post
Response Fetch V1 Jobs  Job Id  Get
Response Cancel V1 Jobs  Job Id  Cancel Post
Response List For Subject V1 Evals Get
Response Fetch V1 Evals  Eval Id  Get
Response Rollouts V1 Evals  Eval Id  Rollouts Get
Response Open Session V1 Realrobot Sessions Post
Response Fetch V1 Deployments  Dep Id  Get
Response Push Version V1 Deployments  Dep Id  Edge Build Version Post
Response Metrics V1 Deployments  Dep Id  Metrics Get
Response Rollout V1 Rollouts  Rollout Id  Get
